[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101000 2
1 011110000 4
2 110001001 4
3 001010110 4
4 001011011 5
5 100011000 3
6 010000111 4
7 110011111 7

01 10 001110111 6
12 21 000111110 5
23 32 011111000 5
34 43 111111001 7
45 54 110101001 5
56 65 001101101 5
67 76 101111101 7
70 07 101110111 7

02 20 001111111 7
13 31 011110110 6
24 42 110101001 5
35 53 011110001 5
46 64 111001101 6
57 75 100110001 4
60 06 001111111 7
71 17 100110110 5

03 30 011110111 7
14 41 110011111 7 match 7
25 52 000101001 3
36 63 011111101 7
47 74 110111001 6
50 05 001110111 6
61 16 001011111 6
72 27 100111000 4

04 40 111111111 a
15 51 000110111 5
26 62 001101101 5
37 73 111110000 5
